title: Authors and Citation
text: Insang Song. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Song (2026). autoSTK: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging. R package version 2.0.0, https://github.com/sigmafelix/autoSTK.
code: @Manual{,   title = {autoSTK: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging},   author = {Insang Song},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 2.0.0},   url = {https://github.com/sigmafelix/autoSTK}, }

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: Description: Automatic spatio-temporal kriging inspired automap (Hiemstra et al. 2010) Inherits automap functions, extensively revised Includes spatiotemporal variogram fitting Kriging analysis

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: remotes::install_github('sigmafelix/autoSTK') R (remotes package required) install package, please make sure gstat, spacetime, automap packages machine

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: autofitVariogramST: automatically fit spatiotemporal variogram Currently support STFDF STSDF class ordinary spatiotemporal Kriging (e.g., y~1) autoKrigeST.cv: automatically cross-validate spatiotemporal data spatial, temporal, spatiotemporal, random slicing

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: Add support STIDF class universal spatiotemporal Kriging: necessitates gstat function fix variogramST.STIDF Transition sf sftime preparation retirement sp October 2023

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: Split data spatial temporal dimensions compatible fitted components spatio-temporal variogram Find optimal theoretical variograms BFHS algorithm following autofitVariogram function automap package; several changes applied

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: input sftime, convert input STIDF STSDF. done automatically cases.

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging
text: Please consult help page main functions autoKrigeST autoKrigeST.cv.
code: library(autoSTK) library(gstat) library(spacetime) library(stars) library(sp)  data(air) deair = STFDF(stations, dates, data.frame(PM10 = as.vector(air))) deair_sf = st_as_stars(deair) %>%     st_transform('+proj=longlat +ellps=sphere') deair_sf = st_transform(deair_sf, 3857) deair_r = as(deair_sf, 'STFDF') deair_r@sp@proj4string = CRS('+proj=merc +a=6378137 +b=6378137 +lat_ts=0 +lon_0=0 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +k=1 +units=m +nadgrids=@null +wktext +no_defs +type=crs')  deair_rs = deair_r[,3701:3800] deair_rss = as(deair_rs, 'STSDF')  ## autoKrigeST akst_stk = autoKrigeST(formula = PM10~1,                         input_data = deair_rss,                         cutoff = 300000, width = 30000,                        type_stv = "sumMetric",                        model = c("Exc", "Mat", "Ste", "Exp", "Wav"),                        tlags = 0:7, cores = 8,                        verbose = TRUE)  akst_stk_stars = st_as_stars(akst_stk[[1]]) plot(akst_stk_stars[1,]) ## autoKrigeST.cv akst_cv_t = autoKrigeST.cv(formula = PM10~1, data = deair_rs,  nfold = 3, fold_dim = 'temporal',                           cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8) akst_cv_s = autoKrigeST.cv(formula = PM10~1, data = deair_rs,  nfold = 3, fold_dim = 'spatial',                           cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8) akst_cv_spt = autoKrigeST.cv(formula = PM10~1, data = deair_rs,  nfold = 4, fold_dim = 'spacetime',                           cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8)

title: Cross-validation of spatiotemporal Kriging — autoKrigeST.cv
text: Cross-validation spatiotemporal Kriging

title: Cross-validation of spatiotemporal Kriging — autoKrigeST.cv
code: autoKrigeST.cv(   data,   fold_dim = c("spatial", "temporal", "random", "spacetime"),   nfold = 10L,   formula,   type_stv = "sumMetric",   block = 0,   model = c("Sph", "Exp", "Gau", "Ste"),   kappa = c(0.05, seq(0.2, 2, 0.1), 5, 10),   fix.values = c(NA, NA, NA),   tlags = 0:6,   cutoff = 20000,   width = 500,   nmax = Inf,   aniso_method = "vgm",   type_joint = "Exp",   prodsum_k = 0.25,   surface = FALSE,   start_vals = c(NA, NA, NA),   miscFitOptions = list(),   measurement_error = c(0, 0, 0),   cores = 1,   seed = 130425L,   variogram_from_full = FALSE,   optimizer = "lbfgsb",   objective = "WLS",   n_restart = 1L,   optimizer_control = list() )

title: Cross-validation of spatiotemporal Kriging — autoKrigeST.cv
text: data `STFDF`-class object fold_dim character. dimension want cross-validate (spatial, temporal, random) nfold integer. number folds. 10 default formula formula. e.g., y~1 type_stv character. One 'sumMetric', 'metric', 'productSum', 'separable' block numeric. passed conduct block spatiotemporal Kriging. model character vector. Default c("Sph", "Exp", "Gau", "Ste"), users can specify list theoretical variograms referring gstat::vgm. kappa numeric vector. Kappa values tested Matern-family variogram models. fix.values numeric vector. Initial values order nugget, range, sill, respectively. tlags integer vector (increasing, preferably consecutive). temporal lags. cutoff numeric. maximum distance sample variogram computed. width numeric. interval variogram cloud summarized. nmax integer positive infinite. maximum number spatiotemporal neighbors conduct local spatiotemporal Kriging. aniso_method character. One 'vgm', 'linear', 'range', 'metric'. Please refer ?gstat::estiStAni. type_joint character. model form joint spatiotemporal variogram. prodsum_k numeric. parameter case 'productSum' chosen type_stv. start_vals numeric vector (3). initial values optimize spatiotemporal variogram model. miscFitOptions list. See ?automap::autofitVariogram. cores integer. number threads used compute sample spatiotemporal variogram. newdata_mode character. One 'rect' (rectangular grid) 'chull' (convex hull) newdata_npoints integer. number points generated range geometry user specified (one rectangle convex hull) GLS.model variogram model. default value NA. variogram model passed, Generalized Lease Squares sample variogram calculated. predict_chunk integer. number data points per chunk new data large data. meticulously chosen according user's machine specification.

title: Cross-validation of spatiotemporal Kriging — autoKrigeST.cv
text: cross-validated spatiotemporal Kriging results.

title: Cross-validation of spatiotemporal Kriging — autoKrigeST.cv
code: library(sp) library(gstat) library(spacetime) library(stars) #> Loading required package: abind #> Loading required package: sf #> Linking to GEOS 3.12.1, GDAL 3.8.4, PROJ 9.4.0; sf_use_s2() is TRUE library(dplyr) #>  #> Attaching package: ‘dplyr’ #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:stats’: #>  #>     filter, lag #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:base’: #>  #>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union data(air) deair <- STFDF(stations, dates, data.frame(PM10 = as.vector(air))) deair_sf <- st_as_stars(deair, crs = "+proj=longlat +ellps=sphere") deair_sf <- st_transform(deair_sf, 3857) deair_r <- as(deair_sf, "STFDF") deair_r@sp@proj4string <- CRS("+init=epsg:3857") #> Warning: GDAL Message 1: +init=epsg:XXXX syntax is deprecated. It might return a CRS with a non-EPSG compliant axis order. deair_rs <- deair_r[, 3751:3800] ## autoKrigeST.cv test akst_cv_t <- autoKrigeST.cv(   formula = PM10 ~ 1, data = deair_rs, nfold = 3, fold_dim = "temporal",   cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8 ) #> Warning: 'tzone' attributes are inconsistent #> Warning: 'tzone' attributes are inconsistent #> Fitting the optimal spatiotemporal variogram model... #> Error in variogramST(formula = formula, data = stf, tlags = tlags, assumeRegular = assumeRegular,     pseudo = pseudo, na.omit = na.omit, cutoff = cutoff, width = width,     cores = cores): For parallelization, future and future.apply packages are required akst_cv_s <- autoKrigeST.cv(   formula = PM10 ~ 1, data = deair_rs, nfold = 3, fold_dim = "spatial",   cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8 ) #> Warning: 'tzone' attributes are inconsistent #> Warning: 'tzone' attributes are inconsistent #> Fitting the optimal spatiotemporal variogram model... #> Error in variogramST(formula = formula, data = stf, tlags = tlags, assumeRegular = assumeRegular,     pseudo = pseudo, na.omit = na.omit, cutoff = cutoff, width = width,     cores = cores): For parallelization, future and future.apply packages are required # akst_cv_r = autoKrigeST.cv(formula = PM10~1, data = deair_rs,  nfold = 3, fold_dim = 'random', #                          cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8) akst_cv_spt <- autoKrigeST.cv(   formula = PM10 ~ 1, data = deair_rs, nfold = 4, fold_dim = "spacetime",   cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 8 ) #> Warning: 'tzone' attributes are inconsistent #> Warning: 'tzone' attributes are inconsistent #> Fitting the optimal spatiotemporal variogram model... #> Error in variogramST(formula = formula, data = stf, tlags = tlags, assumeRegular = assumeRegular,     pseudo = pseudo, na.omit = na.omit, cutoff = cutoff, width = width,     cores = cores): For parallelization, future and future.apply packages are required

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging — autoKrigeST
text: Convenience wrapper fits variogram predicts one call. Internally calls fitVariogramST predictKrigeST.

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging — autoKrigeST
code: autoKrigeST(   formula,   input_data,   new_data,   type_stv = "sumMetric",   block = 0,   model = c("Sph", "Exp", "Gau", "Ste"),   kappa = c(0.05, seq(0.2, 2, 0.1), 5, 10),   fix.values = c(NA, NA, NA),   newdata_mode = "rect",   newdata_npoints = 3000,   GLS.model = NA,   tlags = 0:6,   cutoff = 20000,   width = 500,   forward = 6,   predict_chunk = NULL,   nmax = Inf,   aniso_method = "vgm",   type_joint = "Exp",   prodsum_k = 0.25,   surface = FALSE,   start_vals = c(NA, NA, NA),   miscFitOptions = list(),   measurement_error = c(0, 0, 0),   cores = 1L,   verbose = TRUE,   optimizer = "lbfgsb",   objective = "WLS",   n_restart = 1L,   optimizer_control = list() )

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging — autoKrigeST
text: formula formula (e.g. PM10 ~ 1). input_data Training data (STFDF, STSDF, STIDF, sftime). new_data Prediction grid. missing, generated automatically via create_new_data.ST. type_stv Character. ST variogram model type. Passed typestv autofitVariogramST. block Numeric. Block size block Kriging. model Character vector. Candidate marginal variogram model families. kappa Numeric vector. Kappa values Matern-family models. fix.values Numeric vector (3). Fixed initial values nugget, range, sill. newdata_mode Character. "rect" "chull". newdata_npoints Integer. Number prediction grid points. GLS.model Variogram model GLS sample variogram (rarely needed). tlags Integer vector. Temporal lags. cutoff Numeric. Maximum spatial lag. width Numeric. Spatial lag bin width. forward Integer. Number future time steps predict. predict_chunk Integer NULL. Chunk size large prediction grids. nmax Numeric. Maximum number ST neighbours. aniso_method Character. Anisotropy estimation method. type_joint Character. Joint variogram component model family. prodsum_k Numeric. k parameter productSum models. surface Logical. Return variogram surface? start_vals Numeric vector (3). used v2.0 (kept API compat). miscFitOptions List. used v2.0 (kept API compat). measurement_error Numeric vector (3). Measurement error components. cores Integer. Cores variogramST computation. verbose Logical. Print progress messages. optimizer Character. "lbfgsb" "grid". objective Character. "WLS" "MLE". n_restart Integer. Number optimisation restarts. optimizer_control List. Extra control arguments optimiser.

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging — autoKrigeST
text: autoKrigeST object.

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Kriging — autoKrigeST
code: data(air) #> Warning: data set ‘air’ not found deair <- STFDF(stations, dates, data.frame(PM10 = as.vector(air))) #> Error in STFDF(stations, dates, data.frame(PM10 = as.vector(air))): could not find function "STFDF" deair_rs <- deair[, 3751:3800] #> Error: object 'deair' not found ## Not run: # akst <- autoKrigeST(formula = PM10 ~ 1, input_data = deair_rs, #                     cutoff = 300000, width = 30000, tlags = 0:7, cores = 4)

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Variogram Fitting — autofitVariogramST
text: Fits spatio-temporal variogram model spatio-temporal data frame using automatic parameter estimation.  Supports multiple optimisers objective functions (v2.0+).

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Variogram Fitting — autofitVariogramST
code: autofitVariogramST(   stf,   formula,   typestv = "sumMetric",   candidate_model = c("Ste", "Exc", "Exp", "Wav"),   guess_nugget = NULL,   guess_psill = NULL,   tlags = 0:6,   cutoff = 20000,   width = 500,   aniso_method = "vgm",   type_joint = "Exp",   prodsum_k = NULL,   surface = FALSE,   measurement_error = c(0, 0, 0),   cores = 1L,   verbose = FALSE,   optimizer = c("lbfgsb", "grid"),   objective = c("WLS", "MLE"),   n_restart = 1L,   optimizer_control = list() )

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Variogram Fitting — autofitVariogramST
text: stf spatio-temporal data frame (STFDF, STSDF, STIDF, sftime). formula formula specifying response explanatory variables. typestv Character. ST variogram model type. One "sumMetric", "separable", "productSum", "productSumOld", "simpleSumMetric", "metric". candidate_model Character vector candidate spatial/temporal variogram model families (e.g. c("Ste", "Exc", "Exp", "Wav")). guess_nugget Optional initial guess nugget. Estimated NULL. guess_psill Optional initial guess partial sill. Estimated NULL. tlags Integer vector temporal lags. cutoff Numeric. Maximum spatial lag distance. width Numeric. Width spatial lag bins. aniso_method Character. Method estimating ST anisotropy ratio ("vgm" "linear"). type_joint Character. Model family joint variogram component. prodsum_k Numeric. k parameter productSum models. surface Logical. TRUE, also compute return variogram surface. measurement_error Numeric vector length 3: spatial, temporal, joint. cores Integer. Number cores variogramST. verbose Logical. TRUE, print diagnostic messages. optimizer Character. Optimisation strategy: "lbfgsb" (default, current behaviour) "grid" (LHS grid search + L-BFGS-B). objective Character. Fitting criterion: "WLS" (weighted least squares, default) "MLE" (Gaussian log-likelihood; n < 500). n_restart Integer. Number optimisation restarts optimizer = "lbfgsb".  Default 1 matches v1.x behaviour. optimizer_control Named list extra arguments forwarded optimiser (e.g. list(n_coarse = 100L) "grid").

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Variogram Fitting — autofitVariogramST
text: STVariogramFit object (list) elements: jointSTV Fitted ST variogram model. empSTV Empirical ST variogram. SpV Fitted spatial marginal variogram. TV Fitted temporal marginal variogram. STVsurface (Optional) Variogram surface surface = TRUE. optimizer Character. Optimiser used. objective Character. Objective function used. loglik Numeric. Log-likelihood (objective = "MLE"). n_obs Integer. Number observations (AIC/BIC).

title: Automatic Spatio-Temporal Variogram Fitting — autofitVariogramST
code: library(spacetime) library(sp) library(sftime) data(air) stations <- st_as_sf(stations) stations <- st_transform(stations, 'EPSG:3857') airdf <- data.frame(PM10 = as.vector(air)) stations_full <- do.call(c, rep(stations, length(dates))) dates_full <- rep(dates, each = nrow(stations)) rural <- cbind(airdf, time = dates_full, stations_full) rural <- st_as_sftime(rural, sf_column_name = 'geometry') rr <- rural[match(rural$time, dates[3001:3060], nomatch = FALSE) > 0, ] rr <- as(as(as(rr, "STIDF"), "STFDF"), "STSDF") rrstv <- autofitVariogramST(stf = rr, formula = PM10 ~ 1, surface = TRUE) #> Error in apply(do.call(cbind, lapply(ret, function(x) x$np)), 1, sum,     na.rm = TRUE): dim(X) must have a positive length rrstv #> Error: object 'rrstv' not found

title: A convenience function for the sample spatiotemporal variogram — setSTI
code: setSTI(   stf,   formula,   tlags = 0:6,   cutoff = 30000,   width = 1000,   assumeRegular = FALSE,   pseudo = TRUE,   na.omit = TRUE,   wireframe = FALSE,   plot3d = FALSE,   cores = 1 )

title: A convenience function for the sample spatiotemporal variogram — setSTI
text: stf ST*DF object. formula formula (inherits parameter variogramST) tlags temporal lags compute semivariance (inherits parameter variogramST) cutoff maximum bound set spatial lags (inherits parameter variogramST) width integer (1). spatial lag (inherits parameter variogramST) assumeRegular Boolean. Assuming regular grid? pseudo Boolean. See ?gstat::variogramST na.omit Boolean. Omit NA values. wireframe Boolean. Whether plot StVariogram wireframe . , return class data.frame, list plot3d Boolean. Wheter make three-dimensional graph rgl package logarithm Boolean. log-transformation

title: A convenience function for the sample spatiotemporal variogram — setSTI
text: Depends arguments wireframe (TRUE, list length 2) plot3d (TRUE, list length 3), StVariogram object otherwise.

what: Compute parameter bounds for vgmST model optimisation — st_param_bounds
title: Compute parameter bounds for vgmST model optimisation — st_param_bounds
text: Compute parameter bounds vgmST model optimisation

title: Compute parameter bounds for vgmST model optimisation — st_param_bounds
code: st_param_bounds(   model_template,   stva_emp,   sill_scale = 2,   range_scale = 3,   ani_scale = 20 )

title: Compute parameter bounds for vgmST model optimisation — st_param_bounds
text: model_template vgmST object (initial guess). stva_emp Empirical ST variogram (StVariogram/data.frame) setSTI gstat::variogramST. sill_scale Numeric (2). Upper bound multiplier applied max(stva_emp$gamma) sill/psill/nugget parameters. range_scale Numeric (3). Upper bound multiplier applied maximum spatial lag range parameters. ani_scale Numeric (20). Controls breadth stAni search interval relative data extent.

title: Compute parameter bounds for vgmST model optimisation — st_param_bounds
text: named list elements lower upper (  named numeric vectors matching gstat::extractPar(model_template)).

what: Likelihood Ratio Test for Spatiotemporal Separability — test_separability
title: Likelihood Ratio Test for Spatiotemporal Separability — test_separability
text: Tests whether separable covariance structure adequate versus general sumMetric model using likelihood ratio test (LRT).  models fitted objective = "MLE".

title: Likelihood Ratio Test for Spatiotemporal Separability — test_separability
code: test_separability(stf, formula, ...)

title: Likelihood Ratio Test for Spatiotemporal Separability — test_separability
text: stf Spatio-temporal data (STFDF, STSDF, STIDF, sftime). formula Formula, e.g. PM10 ~ 1. ... Additional arguments forwarded autofitVariogramST (e.g. tlags, cutoff, width, cores).

title: Likelihood Ratio Test for Spatiotemporal Separability — test_separability
text: list elements: statistic LRT chi-squared statistic. df Degrees freedom (difference number parameters). p_value p-value chi-squared distribution. separable_fit Fitted STVariogramFit separable model. summetric_fit Fitted STVariogramFit sumMetric model.
